ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal Presented") && (TEXT(Bid_Process__c) = ""|| ISPICKVAL(Division__c,"")|| ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields are required: RFP Process, Division, Proposal Date, Total Margin, and Annual Encounters.
